items.title: Business case and risk acceptance documented
items.desc: Legal, regulatory, and privacy review before production LLM use.

items.title: Model cards and risk cards published
items.desc: Document capabilities, limitations, and known failure modes.

items.title: Data classification for training and RAG
items.desc: No PII or secrets in fine-tuning or retrieval corpora without controls.

items.title: Third-party model vendor due diligence
items.desc: Review API terms, data retention, and subprocessors.

items.title: TEVV before deployment
items.desc: Testing, evaluation, verification, and validation on representative prompts.

items.title: Prompt injection and jailbreak tests
items.desc: Direct and indirect injection via user content and tool outputs.

items.title: AI red team exercises
items.desc: Adversarial testing for data exfil, tool abuse, and policy bypass.

items.title: RAG poisoning assessment
items.desc: Test if malicious documents in retrieval change model behavior.

items.title: Output filtering and guardrails
items.desc: Block PII leakage, harmful content, and off-topic tool calls.

items.title: Rate limits and abuse detection
items.desc: Prevent automated scraping and resource exhaustion.

items.title: Audit logs for prompts and tool calls
items.desc: Retain logs for incident response without storing secrets in plain text.

items.title: OWASP LLM Top 10 coverage
items.desc: Map controls to LLM01-LLM10 risks for the application.
